task_objective: Land the lunar module safely between the flags with a centered, slow, upright touchdown while minimizing fuel use.
component_blueprint: r_dense_guidance: Encourage small horizontal offset, low velocities, and upright orientation.
r_stability: Reward low angular velocity once both legs are on the ground to prevent bouncing.
r_control_cost: Penalize engine use to promote fuel efficiency.
r_tilt_penalty: Penalize unsafe tilt angles beyond 0.5 rad to enforce safety.
r_landing_success: Large one-time reward for meeting all landing conditions simultaneously.
anti_exploit_principles: No reward for high speed descent regardless of orientation.
No reward for landing only one leg.
No reward for oscillating near the pad without landing.
No reward for engine use; always penalized.
